steps.title: Connect evidence to consensus
steps.content: Economists expected stock market liberalization to help companies raise money. Morgan found that companies in liberalizing countries received significant investment increases in the three years afterward, so the evidence supports that expectation.

steps.title: Reject stronger claims
steps.content: Choice A compares Malaysia and the Philippines, which the text does not do. Choice B says economists missed negative effects, but the evidence supports their view. Choice C says companies benefited only after three years, which misreads the time period. The answer is D.
